block_02: Financial markets are tricky and hard to get in. Luckily, there is one instrument that will let you trade like a PRO right away.
block_03: Binary Options can boast profitability of up to 92%, are easy to learn and offer an unforgettable trading experience. What is even more important is that you can try them absolutely for free thanks to a replenishable $10,000 demo account. Already interested?
block_05: Here is what you want to do in order to trade Binary Options:
block_06: Click on the plus sign (+) in the upper part of the trade room
block_07: Then click Binary in the Options section
block_08: Choose the asset you want to trade
block_09: Specify the amount of money you want to invest
block_11: Push ‘HIGHER’ if you believe the price is about to go up
block_12: Push ‘LOWER’ if you believe the price is about to go down
block_13:
And that’s it.
Binary Option trading is as easy as that!
block_14: Now, when you know how to trade Binary Options, give this fantastic instrument a try.
